# === PASTE THESE 5 COMMANDS ONE BY ONE INTO YOUR SERVER SSH TERMINAL ===

# CMD 1 of 5:
node -e "process.stdout.write(Buffer.from('','base64'))" > /tmp/sv1.bin

# CMD 2 of 5:
node -e "process.stdout.write(Buffer.from('','base64'))" > /tmp/sv2.bin

# CMD 3 of 5:
node -e "process.stdout.write(Buffer.from('','base64'))" > /tmp/sv3.bin

# CMD 4 of 5:
cat /tmp/sv1.bin /tmp/sv2.bin /tmp/sv3.bin > /var/www/tripsync-socket/server.js && echo "Written OK" && wc -c /var/www/tripsync-socket/server.js

# CMD 5 of 5:
pm2 restart tripsync-socket && sleep 2 && curl http://localhost:4000/health
